content:
I was trying to compile a simple module to work along with a device tree overlay on an RPI 5 with 6.12 Kernel version. It seems like of and platform are not supported and throws a compilation error.

use kernel::{of, platform};

May I know which kernel versions support of and platform modules ?
6.14 at the earliest but if there are intentions to submit the module upstream I'd recommend at least 6.18 as LTS kernel after 6.14
